## NHS GRAMPIAN ANNUAL REPORT AND ACCOUNTS FOR YEAR ENDED 31 MARCH 2025
## Deliverable and Milestone Performance for ADP 2024/25

*Q3  Deliverable  reporting  shifted  to  a  more  forward  looking  approach  with  contributors  asked  to  provide  a  prognosis  of Deliverable performance by end of Q4 rather than progress to end Q3
**Milestones achievement were used in Q3 and Q4 as a representative measure of performance in quarter
## Summary of Key Risks/Issues Affecting Overall Delivery
- 37.5% of 32 Deliverables reported in Q4 are complete, 12.5% reported as significant delay, and 1 has been postponed, 57% were reported as minor delay.
- o Child and Maternity priorities, including achievement of UNICEF BFI Gold Standard
- o Agenda for Change working hours reform
- o Agenda for Change protected learning time
